questions.question_zh: 问题 74：Game Days对实际环境的模拟程度？
questions.question_en: How well do Game Days simulate the real environment?
questions.why_important: 真实的演练环境提供可靠的韧性验证

options.description_zh: Game Days在简化环境进行，与生产差异大
options.description_en: Game Days in simplified environment, significantly different from production

options.description_zh: 在预发布环境进行，较接近但仍有差异
options.description_en: Conducted in staging environment, closer but still differences

options.description_zh: 在生产环境进行：真实流量、真实依赖、真实团队、真实压力
options.description_en: Conducted in production: real traffic, real dependencies, real teams, real pressure

questions.aws_best_practice: 生产Game Days最佳实践：1) 选择低流量时段；2) 从小规模开始（单个服务/区域）；3) 使用流量百分比控制影响；4) 准备快速回滚；5) 全员参与（不仅是运维）；6) 实时监控用户影响。获得管理层支持。
questions.why_important_en: Realistic drill environments provide reliable resilience validation
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Production Game Day best practices: 1) Choose low-traffic windows; 2) Start small (single service/region); 3) Use traffic percentage to control impact; 4) Prepare rapid rollback; 5) Full team participation (not just ops); 6) Real-time monitoring of user impact. Secure management support.

questions.question_zh: 问题 75：游戏日的场景有多逼真？
questions.question_en: How realistic are Game Day scenarios?
questions.why_important: 逼真的场景提供有价值的学习机会

options.description_zh: 游戏日场景简单，不代表真实威胁
options.description_en: Game Day scenarios simple, not representing real threats

options.description_zh: 基于常见故障，但缺少复杂性或意外性
options.description_en: Based on common failures but lacking complexity or surprises

options.description_zh: 高度逼真：基于真实事件、多点故障、级联效应、时间压力、意外挑战
options.description_en: Highly realistic: based on real incidents, multi-point failures, cascading effects, time pressure, unexpected challenges

questions.aws_best_practice: 设计有效的Game Day场景：1) 基于历史重大事件；2) 包含多个并发故障；3) 测试跨团队协作；4) 引入意外元素（红队攻击）；5) 模拟沟通挑战；6) 测试决策制定。使用 AWS FIS 注入真实故障。
questions.why_important_en: Realistic scenarios provide valuable learning opportunities
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Design effective Game Day scenarios: 1) Based on historical major incidents; 2) Include multiple concurrent failures; 3) Test cross-team collaboration; 4) Introduce unexpected elements (red team attacks); 5) Simulate communication challenges; 6) Test decision making. Use AWS FIS to inject real failures.

questions.question_zh: 问题 76：游戏日的重现性如何？
questions.why_important: 可重现的Game Days确保持续学习和改进

options.description_zh: Game Days是一次性活动，难以重复
options.description_en: Game Days are one-time events, difficult to repeat

options.description_zh: 有基本的脚本，但需要大量手动准备
options.description_en: Basic scripts exist but require significant manual preparation

options.description_zh: 完全可重现：自动化场景脚本、标准化评估、版本控制、定期执行
options.description_en: Fully reproducible: automated scenario scripts, standardized assessment, version control, regular execution

questions.aws_best_practice: 建立Game Day流程：1) 使用AWS FIS模板定义场景；2) 文档化准备清单和角色；3) 标准化评分标准；4) 自动化场景执行；5) 定期安排（季度）；6) 比较前后结果。存储在runbook库中。
questions.why_important_en: Reproducible Game Days ensure continuous learning and improvement
questions.aws_best_practice_en: Establish Game Day process: 1) Define scenarios using AWS FIS templates; 2) Document preparation checklists and roles; 3) Standardize scoring criteria; 4) Automate scenario execution; 5) Schedule regularly (quarterly); 6) Compare before/after results. Store in runbook library.
